scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,SERVER -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @ridesync/web" "npm run dev -w @ridesync/server"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build -w @ridesync/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ridesync/shared && npm run typecheck -w @ridesync/server && npm run typecheck -w @ridesync/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @ridesync/shared && npm run lint -w @ridesync/server && npm run lint -w @ridesync/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ridesync/shared && npm run test -w @ridesync/server && npm run test -w @ridesync/web
